archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Command Center Variant)
core_principles: User-centric efficiency with high visual clarity
Neutral/Obsidian backgrounds with high-contrast glowing accents
Dense, functional control-room grid with cardless rectangular elements
Strict alignment and precise borders over soft shadows

typography.instruction: Agent MUST import 'Exo 2', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono' from Google Fonts in the main HTML/CSS.

spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6

components.buttons: Flat background, 1px border. Hover: Glowing cyan text shadow and slight lift. Font: IBM Plex Mono uppercase.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-[#050608], border-[#212530], text-[#F1F5F9]. Focus: ring-1 ring-[#00E5FF] border-[#00E5FF].
components.progress_bars: Tactical style. Square edges. Neon glow based on status (e.g., BBM level uses green/amber/red based on %).
components.tables: Dense. 1px border-b on rows. Hover: bg-[#171A21]. Headers in uppercase mono font.
components.tabs: Underline style with cyan indicator, or sharp rectangular blocks.

surfaces.name: The Tracing Beam
surfaces.usage: AI Analysis Panel or Active Alerts
surfaces.implementation: 1px moving gradient border using Framer Motion or CSS animation, blurred for light bleed.

surfaces.name: Retro-Futurism / Terminal
surfaces.implementation: Scanline background overlay, subtle text drop-shadow for glow effect.

3d_strategy.usage: Interactive ship visualization on asset details. Use OrbitControls. Provide a wireframe or metallic shader for the 3D model to fit the tactical theme.
3d_strategy.lighting: Low ambient light, strong directional cyan/blue lights to highlight edges.

hero_backgrounds.description: Digital holographic globe for command center login background
Nautical navigation/sonar screen for intelligence panels

ships.description: Large military ship docked - Dummy KRI 2

bases.description: Naval base port at night - Sorong/Manokwari dummy

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is forced on everything. Remove all white-background defaults from Shadcn components.
Implement Auth flow with custom JWT logic as requested.
For the 3D ship viewer, use Three.js (@react-three/fiber). Use a placeholder box or generic primitive if no ship 3D model is available, but apply a wireframe or custom material to look tactical.
Base64 image storage: Convert image uploads to base64 strings and store in the database/localStorage.
For the AI Analysis feature (Claude Sonnet 4.5), simulate an API call or connect if you have keys. Output the AI text with a typewriter effect for the tactical feel.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with weight='regular' for a clean, technical look.
Strictly avoid 'Inter' for headings. Use Exo 2 and IBM Plex Mono.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
